channel.title: CliteHD on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in CliteHD on Tech Tracker

item.title: Clite HD - The underrated video conferencing app for android !
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-3EjpL822zmQ/X5xMtXGcXcI/AAAAAAAACCI/GXhQv-Xa_S856EkJlmk5SKgOolJWAQ7SwCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1604078764643772-0.png" alt=""> In time of covid 19 pandemic digital usage rising like never before to teach, interact, meet, educate, verifying documents etc all are done using video calling or conferencing. Video calling apps getting millions of downloads from past 1 year and continously increasing the usage statistics. In the category of communication video calling is more preffered way to connect to people in this time now a days google meet & zoom are the most used and preffered video calling apps.
